message.content:
Fetch this URL and extract all job details: https://ibqbjb.fa.ocs.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/Honeywell/job/148205

Return: job title, location, team/division, full job description, required skills, preferred qualifications, and any specific responsibilities mentioned. Copy the exact text wherever possible.

content.text: I'll fetch the URL and extract the job details for you.

input.prompt: Extract the following job details: job title, location, team/division, full job description, required skills, preferred qualifications, and specific responsibilities. Return the exact text for each section.

content.content:
I can only see "Honeywell" as the page content provided. There are no job details, descriptions, location information, team assignments, skills requirements, or qualifications visible in the material shared.

To extract the job details you're requesting, I would need the actual job posting content, which should include sections such as:
- Job title
- Location
- Team/division
- Full job description
- Required skills
- Preferred qualifications
- Specific responsibilities

Please provide the complete job posting webpage content, and I'll extract those details following your specifications.

content.text:
Unfortunately, the URL you provided is not publicly accessible or the content did not load properly. The page appears to be a restricted job portal that requires authentication or may have access restrictions that prevent automated fetching.

The URL (https://ibqbjb.fa.ocs.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/Honeywell/job/148205) points to Honeywell's Oracle Cloud HCM candidate experience portal, which typically requires logging in or has JavaScript rendering requirements that web scraping tools cannot process.

**To get the job details, you have a few options:**

1. **Access the page directly** - Visit the URL in your browser, log in if needed, and manually copy the job details
2. **Provide the HTML content** - If you can save the page content or view source, share it with me and I can extract the details
3. **Check if there's a public job board link** - Honeywell may have the same job posted on their main careers page or LinkedIn

If you have access to the page and can copy the content, I'd be happy to extract and format the job details for you.
